title: SICP 3.5 stream integrators and signal systems
goal: Add tests/sicp/ch3_stream_signal_systems.esk covering stream integrators, ODE/signal-processing examples, smoothing, and zero-crossing behavior from SICP 3.5.
acceptance: ICC observes sicp_ch3_stream_signal_systems_r and sicp_ch3_stream_signal_systems_aot PASS
ux_payoff: Makes the stream/signal claim concrete instead of relying on a partial stream smoke.
